mapper.sql: select friend_links_id, name, url, logo, description, email, status, join_time from friend_links
mapper.insert: insert into friend_links (name, url, logo, description, email, status, join_time,create_time,create_by,is_deleted) values (#{name}, #{url}, #{logo}, #{description}, #{email}, #{status}, #{joinTime},#{createTime},#{createBy},0)
mapper.update:
update friend_links
name = #{name}, url = #{url}, logo = #{logo}, description = #{description}, email = #{email}, join_time = #{joinTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_by = #{updateBy},
where friend_links_id = #{friendLinksId} and is_deleted = 0 and status != 2

update friend_links
status = #{status},
where friend_links_id = #{friendLinksId} and is_deleted = 0
update friend_links set is_deleted = 1 where friend_links_id = #{friendLinksId}
